mapper.select: select t.*,u.nick_name create_name from outstanding t left join sys_user u on t.create_by = u.user_id ${ew.customSqlSegment}
select t.*,u.nick_name create_name from outstanding t left join sys_user u on t.create_by = u.user_id where t.id < #{id} order by `id` desc limit 1
select t.*,u.nick_name create_name from outstanding t left join sys_user u on t.create_by = u.user_id where t.id > #{id} order by `id` limit 1
